extName.message: PeRank - search results by relevance, not ads

extDesc.message: Re-ranks search results by relevance, hides ads and sponsored results, and helps you dig past the first page. No tracking.

modeDescOriginal.message: You are seeing the original order from $ENGINE$.

modeDescInvert.message: You are seeing REVERSED results: the ones usually buried at the bottom come first.

modeDescRelevance.message: You are seeing results ranked by RELEVANCE: the badge shows a score, hover it for the criteria.

modeTipOriginal.message: The order as the search engine shows it

modeTipInvert.message: Flips the order: last results first

modeTipRelevance.message: Re-ranks by how well each result matches your search words

barTitleAttr.message: Re-ranks results and hides sponsored ones · $ENGINE$

deepBtnTitle.message: Load more results from deeper pages and re-rank them

badgeTip.message:
Relevance score — how it is calculated:
+3 if a searched word is in the title, +2 if in the URL, +1 if in the text.
+5 if the title contains ALL the searched words.
+4 if the title contains the exact phrase.
Bonus for authentic sources (forums, Wikipedia, GitHub, .org/.edu/.gov).
Penalty for heavily commercial domains.

deepNoteBody.message: Some search engines show few results per page and tend to put sponsored or heavily optimised content on top. You can run the same query on an open search engine and see results from deeper down, reversed and without sponsors.

deepNoteFree.message: · You are free to go back to $ENGINE$ whenever you want.

deepNoteEngines.message: Deep search via Brave Search, DuckDuckGo or your own SearXNG instance · configurable in settings

actUpTitle.message: Promote $HOST$: its results move up in the score

actDownTitle.message: Demote $HOST$: its results move down in the score

actGemTitle.message: Save / remove this result from your gems

popupSubtitle.message: Relevance instead of advertising: reverses, re-ranks and cleans up your results.

popupIgnoreStopwords.message: Ignore common words (of, the, a...) in the score

popupBlacklistHint.message: One domain per line. These results are always hidden.

popupWhitelistHint.message: One domain per line. They get priority in the relevance score.

popupVotesHint.message: Use 👍 / 👎 next to the results. The ✕ removes the vote for that single site.

popupNoGems.message: No gems saved yet. Use ⭐ next to a result.

popupEnginesList.message: Supported engines: Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Startpage, Yandex, Brave, Ecosia, Yahoo.
